name: Chicken Fried Steak and Grav
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------------GRAVY-----------------------------------
4 tablespoons Fat
4 tablespoons Flour (unbleached)
1 quart Milk
Tenderize round steak. Dip in milk and then flour, salt, and pepper to taste.
Fry in deep fat at approximately 375 Degrees F until golden brown. After the steak is done, pour off fat, leaving about 4 tablespoons in the pan. Add 4 tablespoons flour. Stir until smooth. Add 1 quart milk. Stir and cook until thickened for steak gravy.
From New Mexico bbs... Enjoy! Kevin Wilson MHDT47A
